summary: Modern advertising agency website with black, golden yellow, and white theme using Bootstrap 5
architectural_notes: Color scheme: black, golden yellow, white
AOS library for smooth fade animations
Modern sans-serif typography with generous white space

existing_features.title: Create a hero section with a large impactful headline, short tagline, and a call-to-action button labeled 'Let's Work Together' with subtle animation or motion effect
Create an About Us section with brief agency introduction, mission and vision statements, using clean layout with strong typography
Create a Services section with clearly defined service cards for Branding, Digital Marketing, Social Media Management, Creative Strategy, and Web Design, including hover effects and minimal icons
Create a Portfolio/Case Studies section with grid layout displaying image previews, project titles with short descriptions, and hover overlay effects

Create a contact form with fields for Name, Email, Phone, Company, Service Required, and Message, featuring modern input styling, form validation, submit button, and clean two-column layout on desktop
Create a footer section with social media links, quick navigation links, contact information, and copyright notice
Implement black, golden yellow, and white color palette throughout the website with modern sans-serif typography, generous white space, and high-contrast layouts
Implement responsive mobile-first design ensuring all sections work seamlessly across devices
Add smooth scrolling behavior and smooth animations using AOS library or fade effects throughout the website with subtle micro-interactions
Implement sticky navigation bar that remains visible when scrolling
Add animated transitions between sections to enhance visual flow

Create a Careers section component positioned above the footer in the main page layout with company culture introduction including 'Join Our Team' headline and a brief paragraph about innovation, creativity, and performance-driven environment

Display 3-5 job listings in the Careers section with example positions: Digital Marketing Specialist, Paid Ads Manager, Social Media Strategist, Web Designer/Developer, and Sales & Client Success Manager
Each job listing must display job title, short description, location (Remote/On-site), and an 'Apply Now' button with golden yellow accent styling consistent with the site theme
Implement fade-in animations for the Careers section using IntersectionObserver pattern consistent with existing About, Services, and Portfolio components
Update Navigation component to include 'Careers' link that smoothly scrolls to the new Careers section

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with headline, tagline, CTA button, and animation
About Us section with agency introduction, mission, and vision
Services section with service cards and hover effects
Portfolio/Case Studies section with grid layout and hover overlays
Contact form with validation and two-column layout
Footer with social links, navigation, and contact info
Responsive design with smooth scrolling and animations (AOS)
Optional: sticky navigation, cursor effects, dark mode
Careers section with company culture intro, job listings (title, description, location, Apply Now button) above footer
